prompt:
Help frame the research described in the benchmark case as a concrete business-research problem. Preserve the supplied model and identify claims or information that remain unsupported.

Condition instructions:
Respond as you normally would to this user request using only the serialized case material. Do not assume facts that are not supplied.

Benchmark case:
```json
{
  "adversarial": false,
  "decision_time_facts": [

    "travel times",

    "time windows"

    {

  ],
  "fidelity_requirements": [

    "Do not claim untested performance"

  "id": "or-02",

    "mechanism": "Search ordering affects the quality of the incumbent available when the operational deadline stops computation.",

  },
  "prohibited_inferences": [
    "The new method is proven faster on all instances"

  "prompt": "A dispatch plan must be produced within five minutes.   "title": "Optimization speed under dispatch deadlines"
```
